text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the tryouts, but before the races begin, I go to see how
Kawakami Princess is doing.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hello, Trainer. You really came to see my race.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I didn't get much sleep to be honest! I was so nervous I couldn't think
straight, so I watched all forty-nine episodes of Princess Fighter!
choice_data_list: Whoa, can you race after that?!
Whoa, can you race after that?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I don't know! But even Princess Fighter says princesses have to risk it
all at the end, so I have to try!
choice_data_list: Well, I'll be here rooting for you.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Okay, I should get going!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The weather's finally cleared after last night's rain, but which
Umamusume will be a breath of fresh air and claim their chance to
debut?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
All these evenly matched Umamusume will make for a highly
competitive race. Everyone's lined up at the gates, and... there's the
start!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (Ah, it feels great to run with everything I have!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (I've always loved princesses, but I love being active too.)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(Then when I met King, I was really impressed. Sure, she has the
dignity of a princess, but... she also never loses spirit.)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(Her and Princess Fighter have that same dazzling strength. It makes
me jealous of how bright and sparkly they are...)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (But what is it I really admire most?)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (It's so hard... I just don't know. I tried copying them, but that didn't help. What do I want to be? What kind of princess do I want to become?)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer said I have my own way, that I have my own ideal to aim for...
But I don't see it!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, she slipped right before the last turn! Kawakami Princess is
hurtling toward the outside.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
That sent her into the mud. She must've misjudged the track... Ah
well, these things happen with pre-debuts.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: It'll be hard to get back after that. Kinda makes me feel bad for her.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (I don't understand... Can I really not do this?)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (Am I not meant to become... a princess?)
choice_data_list: You can't stop! You're a princess after all!
You can't stop! You're a princess after all!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's regained control! Kawakami Princess is running with all her
might now. Will she be able to catch up to the front though?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Will she make it? She can't close the gap, but she's trying hard.
choice_data_list: Go for it! Don't give up on your ideal self!
Go for it! Don't give up on your ideal self!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I hear you... loud... and CLEAR!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This is amazing! Kawakami Princess is giving an amazing chase. She's
going straight to the front from way outside!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Aaagh! I... am... a princess! I will become a princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(I see it now. All I really wanted was to never give up... on becoming a
princess and on being myself!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (The whole point of an ideal is to help me be a better me. It's all for nothing if I don't keep running for my dream and for myself!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: That's the finish!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess was on fire! She fought till the last and made it all
the way to first place!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Look at me now! A princess smashes through any adversity!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Traineeer, I did it! I went for what I wanted and took the win!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for cheering for me! I could hear you so clearly,
and I'll never forget it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I really do want to be a beautiful, graceful, and courageous
princess. But a princess...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Keeps on running through the worst of it and never gives up on
herself! A princess never gives up on her ideals!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So I don't care if I looked a little ungraceful this time! I'm going to
become graceful someday, in my own special way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her beaming expression, I realize that I have to tell her right
now.
choice_data_list: I want to help you achieve your dream.
I want to help you achieve your dream.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wha? You want to help? Wait, does that mean what I think it means?!
choice_data_list:
To be clear, I'm still nothing like Legendary
Trainer or anything...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So long as she wants to become her ideal version of a princess, I want
to become a legendary trainer to help her along the way.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Of course! You opened my eyes when I'd lost sight of my dream!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I know I can be my ideal version of a princess with your help! I won't
fail!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Our legend will rock the world! Onward to beauty, grace, and
becoming the strongest, fastest princess there is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the day I start my adventure with the rough and tough
Kawakami Princess!
